race.comment: ABOUT TO EXPLODE (6) has gotten better with both runs this time in work and looks the building up to another victory. Is a three-time winner over this track and trip and looks the one they all have to run down. MOONHAVEN (7) has put back-to-back wins together around this circuit and is racing high on confidence of late. Has to be included in calculations. The well-related BRERETON (5) (full to G3 winner Space Rider) has been thereabouts in recent efforts and is drawn to get a soft run in transit from the inside alley. Can play a pivotal role in the outcome. POCKET FULL (4) is a two-time winner here and handles all going. One for the exotics players. HE'S HEAVEN (3) next best in a race with only a handful of chances.
